## Instructions
Work in the Lean repo at /<repo-root>/CausalSmith. Toolchain: `source ../env-lean.sh` (or use /<home>/.elan/bin/lake). Build target: `lake build CausalSmith.Substrate.SuperpopNetworkMeanClt.Hypotheses`.

The simp lemma `centeredNormalizedField_X` rewrites `(centeredNormalizedField Y adj hrefl hsymm hmeasY hindepY s).X i ω = (Y i ω - ∫ x, Y i x ∂μ) / s`. `depSum X ω = ∑ i, X i ω` (`Causalean.SteinMethod.depSum`). `[IsProbabilityMeasure μ]` is in scope. Each `hL2 i : MemLp (Y i) 2 μ` gives `Integrable (Y i) μ` via `(hL2 i).integrable (by norm_num)`.

1. `centeredNormalizedField_integral_eq_zero` (mean-zero): show `∫ ω, (Y i ω - ∫ x, Y i x ∂μ)/s ∂μ = 0`. Use `simp only [centeredNormalizedField_X]`, then `integral_div`, `integral_sub (hL2 i).integrable… (integrable_const _)`, `integral_const`, `measure_univ`/`measureReal_univ` (prob measure ⇒ `∫ c = c`). Result: `(∫Y i − ∫Y i)/s = 0`. `simp`/`ring` finishes.

2. `centeredNormalizedField_sq_integral` (unit variance): show `∫ ω, (∑ i, (Y i ω − ∫Y i)/s)^2 ∂μ = 1` given `0 < s` and `hs2 : s^2 = variance (fun ω => ∑ i, Y i ω) μ`. Strategy: let `S := fun ω => ∑ i, Y i ω`. Show the integrand sum equals `(S ω − ∫ x, S x ∂μ)/s` (pull out `/s` with `Finset.sum_div`, `Finset.sum_sub_distrib`, and `∫ S = ∑ ∫ Y i` via `integral_finset_sum`). Then `∫ ((S − ∫S)/s)^2 = (∫ (S − ∫S)^2)/s^2`. Note `∫ ω, (S ω − ∫S)^2 ∂μ = variance S μ` (use `ProbabilityTheory.variance_eq_integral` with `S` AEMeasurable — `S` is a finite sum of measurables; `hL2` gives `MemLp S 2` via `MemLp.sum`/`memLp_finset_sum`). So the integral `= variance S / s^2 = s^2/s^2 = 1` using `hs2` and `s ≠ 0` (`ne_of_gt hs_pos`). Useful: `ProbabilityTheory.variance_eq_integral`, `variance_eq_sub`. Check exact `variance_eq_integral` argument form with `lean_hover_info`.

3. `centeredNormalizedField_abs_le` (bound): show `|(Y i ω − ∫Y i)/s| ≤ 2*c/s` given `0<s`, `hc : ∀ i ω, |Y i ω − ∫Y i| ≤ c`. `simp only [centeredNormalizedField_X]`; `abs_div`, `abs_of_pos hs_pos`; then `|Y i ω − ∫Y i|/s ≤ c/s` (`div_le_div_of_nonneg_right`/`div_le_div_of_le_left`-style, monotonic in numerator with `s>0`); finally `c/s ≤ 2*c/s` since `0 ≤ c` (from `le_trans (abs_nonneg _) (hc i ω)`) and `s>0`. Use `gcongr` to discharge the monotone steps.

Inspect goals with `lean_goal` before writing tactics. Verify with the build command; confirm no `sorry`.

Use the lean-lsp MCP tools to check your proof (diagnostics/goal). When done, output a SHORT plain-text report: which decls you closed, which remain, and any blocker. No JSON required.
